## getTemplateDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the `template-get` command.

Drives CLI subcommand `template-get` and MCP tool `template_get`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getTemplateDescriptor: import("../registry/define.js").ResolvedCommandDescriptor<{
    templateName: string;
}, ProjectTemplate, z.ZodObject<{
    templateName: z.ZodString;
}, "strip", z.ZodTypeAny, {
    templateName: string;
}, {
    templateName: string;
}>>
```
